notes: Dual-wield build with two Hellscream's Cleavers. Icy Veins lists both offensive and defensive enchant/gem options per slot — offensive picks shown here, swap to stamina/avoidance for progression. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
